---
title: "Supplemental Figure 2"
author: IBBruns
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-26"
---


# Set up script
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
standard_plotTheme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 15,
      face = "bold",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 13,
      face = "italic",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 0.25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


theme_set(standard_plotTheme)

# define 6 custom colors
timepoint_cols <- c(
  "#1f77b4",  # blue 
  "#d95f02",  # orange
  "#7570b3",  # violet
  "#e7298a",  # magenta/pink
  "#66a61e",  # green
  "#e6ab02"   # mustard yellow
)

```



MANUSCRIPT FIGURE 2
Here, we will generate figure 2 from the PARC ab initio manuscript

# Settings

## Set studyNR
```{r}
studyNR = "EUT046"
```


## Load packages
```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, here, ggpubr, patchwork, grid, GGally, ggplotify)
```


## Load functions
```{r}
source(here("functions.R"), local = knitr::knit_global())
```



## Directories
```{r}
inputDir = file.path(here(), "input", studyNR)
outputDir = file.path(here(), "output", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(outputDir)){
  dir.create(outputDir)
}

plotDir = file.path(here(), "figures", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(plotDir)){
  dir.create(plotDir)
}
```



# Load data
```{r}
load(file.path(outputDir, "WrangledInput", "WrangledInputData.RData"))

tpod_original = data.table::fread(file.path(outputDir, "tpod_calculations_alltimepoints.txt")) %>%
  mutate(time_num = as.numeric(gsub("h", "", timepoint)),
         timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("4h", "8h", "16h", "24h", "48h", "72h")),
         method = factor(method, levels = c("5th percentile", "25th ranked gene", "LCRD", "First mode")))

```


# Generate figure




## BMC distribution + tPOD calculations
Only for the most sensitive timepoint (24 hours)

```{r}
library(ggnewscale)

tpod_cols <- c(
  "5th percentile"        = "#1b9e77",
  "25th ranked gene"   = "#d95f02",
  "LCRD"   = "#7570b3",
  "First mode" =  "#249"
)


plot_data = norm_BMD_combined %>%
  mutate(
    partner = case_when(
      partner == "AU" ~ "AristotleU",
      partner == "BPI" ~ "BPI",
      partner == "GU" ~ "GhentU",
      partner == "LU" ~ "LeidenU",
      partner == "SC" ~ "Sciensano"
    )
  )


supfig4 <- ggplot() +
  # ---- densities (per timepoint + partner) ----
  geom_density(
    data = plot_data,
    aes(
      x     = finalBMD,
      colour = timepoint,
      fill   = timepoint
      # if needed, you can add group = interaction(timepoint, partner)
    ),
    linewidth = 1,
    alpha     = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = timepoint_cols,
    name   = "timepoint"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = timepoint_cols,
    name   = "timepoint"
  ) +

  # reset colour so we can reuse it for tPOD
  new_scale_color() +

  # ---- tPOD vertical lines (same facets) ----
  geom_vline(
    data = tpod_original,
    aes(
      xintercept = tpod_orig,
      linetype   = method,
      colour     = method
    ),
    linewidth   = 1.5,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = tpod_cols,
    labels = c("5th percentile", "first mode", "LCRD", "25th ranked gene"),
    name   = "tPOD measure"
  ) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(
    name   = "tPOD measure",
    breaks = c("5th percentile", "25th ranked gene", "LCRD", "First mode")
  ) +
  # scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    x        = "BMC",
    linetype = "tPOD measure"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(timepoint),
    cols = vars(partner),
    scales = "free"
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

supfig4

ggsave(plot = supfig4, file.path(plotDir, "SupplementalFigure4.pdf"), width=15, height = 13)

```
